zh.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑桑瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam De Melun III於大約1205年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯默倫時，他的父親Guillaume De Melun II16歲，母親Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay19歲。他於1235年與Gertude在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年2月9日在埃及享年46歲。

zh-hans.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑桑瑟
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam De Melun III于大约1205年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯默倫时，他的父亲Guillaume De Melun II16岁，母亲Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay19岁。他于1235年与Gertude在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年2月9日在埃及享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alvar, Anders, Hilmer, Hiltrud, Sven.

Swedish: probably an ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element mel, from Old Norse methal ‘mid, middle’, + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Czech (Melín): from a pet form of the personal name Melichar ‘Melchior’.

variants.name: Lemelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Alcide, Armand, Damien, Emile, Gaston, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the personal name Melin (see Melin 4) or its cognate Emelin, with fused definite article l(e).
History: Jean Lemelin dit (Le) Tourangeau from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marguerite Brassard in Quebec City, QC, in 1658.

variants.name: Melichar
meanings: Czech; Slovak (also Melichár): from a vernacular form of the Biblical personal name Melchior .

variants.name: Meline
meanings: French: from a shortened form of the personal name Ameline, feminine form of Amelin (see Melin 4).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam De Melun III was born about 1205, in Melun, Île-de-France, France, his father, Guillaume De Melun II, was 16 and his mother, Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay, was 19. He married Gertude in 1235, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 9 February 1250, in Egypt, at the age of 46.

fr.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam De Melun III est né environ 1205, à Melun, Île-de-France, France, son père, Guillaume De Melun II, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Gertude en 1235, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 février 1250, à Égypte, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Adam De Melun III um 1205 in Melun, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume De Melun II 16 und seine Mutter Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay 19. Er hat 1235 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Gertude geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1250 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Ägypten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Melun III è nato il circa 1205 nel Melun, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume De Melun II, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Gertude nel 1235, nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 9 febbraio 1250, nel Egitto, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 산서르
ko.lifeSummary: Adam De Melun III(이)가 대략 1205년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 멜루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume De Melun II(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1235년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 Gertude(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 2월 9일 이집트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Melun III nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Melun, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Guillaume De Melun II, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertude em 1235, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1250, em Egipto, com 46 anos.

ru.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: сансирр, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam De Melun III родился около 1205 г. в местности мелун, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume De Melun II было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertude в 1235 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 9 февраля 1250 г. в местности Египет в возрасте 46 лет.
